ham.subject: Quarterly Performance Review – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Please note that the Q1 performance review minutes are now circulated in the shared drive. Make sure to read and acknowledge by Friday.

Thanks,
Performance Team

spam.subject: Urgent: HR Verification – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

Our records indicate an issue with your employee ID verification. To avoid payroll delays, you must upload your government ID within the next 24 hours.

Please submit your documents here: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention,
HR Security Team
